---
title: "Supplementary: Linear Modelling"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: lumen
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lmerTest)
library(patchwork)
library(here)

analysis_dir <- here("analysis")

source(file.path(analysis_dir, "knitr.R"))
source(file.path(analysis_dir, "theme.R"))
theme_set(theme_paper(base_size = 12))
```

```{r load_data, include=FALSE}
source(file.path(analysis_dir, "data.R"))
```

# Data preparation

```{r prep}
metrics_lm <- metrics_new %>%
  mutate(
    d_cluster = relevel(as.factor(d_cluster), ref = "0"),
    n_comp = as.factor(n_comp),
    n_neig = as.factor(n_neig),
    n_hvg = as.factor(n_hvg)
  )
```

# Linear models

```{r linear-models}
datasets <- levels(metrics_lm$dataset)
lm_fits <- setNames(lapply(datasets, function(d) {
  lm(
    agree_ari_leiden ~ method + d_cluster + filtering + n_comp + n_neig + n_hvg,
    data = metrics_lm %>% filter(dataset == d)
  )
}), datasets)

lapply(lm_fits, summary)
```

# Coefficients

```{r coefficients, fig.height=5, fig.width=6.69}
assign_grp <- function(nms) {
  grp <- gsub("[0-9]", "", nms)
  grp <- gsub("-", "", grp)
  grp[grep("method", grp)] <- "method"
  grp[grep("filtering", grp)] <- "filtering"
  grp[grp == "(Intercept)"] <- "Intercept"
  factor(grp, levels = c(
    "Intercept", "method", "d_cluster", "filtering", "n_comp", "n_neig", "n_hvg"
  ))
}

coefs_m <- bind_rows(
  lapply(lm_fits, function(fit) {
    data.frame(
      grp = assign_grp(names(coef(fit))), value = coef(fit),
      t_value = summary(fit)$coefficients[, "t value"]
    )
  }),
  .id = "dataset"
) %>%
  mutate(
    dataset     = factor(dataset, levels = datasets),
    Baseline    = if_else(grp == "Intercept", "Absolute", "Relative"),
    significant = if_else(abs(t_value) >= 2.5, "yes", "no")
  )

p1 <- ggplot(
  coefs_m, aes(grp, value,
    colour = dataset, shape = significant, size = significant, group = dataset
  )
) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.45), alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_color_dataset(
    name = "Dataset",
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = 19, size = 3))
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(no = 21, yes = 19), guide = "none") +
  scale_size_manual(values = c(no = 1.5, yes = 3), guide = "none") +
  facet_wrap(~Baseline, scales = "free", space = "free_x") +
  labs(x = "Parameter group", y = "Coefficient")
p1
```

# Mixed effects models

```{r mixed-effects}
lmer_fits <- setNames(lapply(datasets, function(d) {
  lmer(
    agree_ari_leiden ~ (1 | d_cluster) + (1 | filtering) +
      (1 | n_comp) + (1 | n_neig) + (1 | n_hvg) + (1 | method),
    data = metrics_lm %>% filter(dataset == d)
  )
}), datasets)
```

# Variance components

```{r variance-components, fig.height=3, fig.width=6.69}
get_varcomps <- function(m, label) {
  as.data.frame(VarCorr(m)) %>%
    select(grp, vcov) %>%
    mutate(vcov = vcov / sum(vcov), dataset = factor(label, levels = datasets))
}

vp <- mapply(get_varcomps, lmer_fits, datasets, SIMPLIFY = FALSE) %>%
  bind_rows() %>%
  mutate(grp = factor(grp, levels = c(
    "Intercept", "method", "d_cluster", "filtering",
    "n_comp", "n_neig", "n_hvg", "Residual"
  )))

p2 <- ggplot(vp, aes(grp, vcov, fill = dataset)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_dataset(name = "Dataset") +
  labs(x = "Parameter group", y = "% variance explained")
p2
```

# Patchwork

```{r supp-linear-modelling, fig.height=8, fig.width=6.69}
(p1 / p2) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1.5, 1), guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") &
  guides(fill = "none")
```
